  export const texts = [{"value":"@ant-design/x-card","paraId":0,"tocIndex":0},{"value":" 是一个基于 ","paraId":0,"tocIndex":0},{"value":"A2UI 协议","paraId":0,"tocIndex":0},{"value":" 的动态卡片渲染组件，让 AI Agent 能够通过结构化的 JSON 消息流，动态构建和渲染交互式界面。","paraId":0,"tocIndex":0},{"value":"A2UI（Agent-to-User Interface）是一个开放协议，允许 AI Agent 通过声明式的 JSON 消息序列描述交互意图，由前端运行时动态渲染为原生 UI 组件。","paraId":1,"tocIndex":1},{"value":"A2UI 建立在三个核心思想之上：","paraId":2,"tocIndex":2},{"value":"流式消息（Streaming Messages）","paraId":3,"tocIndex":2},{"value":"：UI 更新以 JSON 消息序列的形式从 Agent 流向客户端","paraId":3,"tocIndex":2},{"value":"声明式组件（Declarative Components）","paraId":3,"tocIndex":2},{"value":"：UI 以数据形式描述，而非代码编程","paraId":3,"tocIndex":2},{"value":"数据绑定（Data Binding）","paraId":3,"tocIndex":2},{"value":"：UI 结构与应用状态分离，实现响应式更新","paraId":3,"tocIndex":2},{"value":"与传统让 AI 直接生成 HTML 不同，A2UI 采用结构化数据流的方式，具有显著优势：","paraId":4,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"特性","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"A2UI","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"AI 生成 HTML","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"安全性","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"仅使用预定义组件目录（Catalog），无代码执行风险","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"可能包含恶意脚本，存在注入风险","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"跨平台","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"一套数据结构自动适配 Web、移动端等多端原生组件","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"HTML 需额外适配不同设备，易出现样式错乱","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"流式渲染","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"支持渐进式渲染，用户体验流畅","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"需等待完整响应，加载时间长","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"LLM 友好","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"扁平 JSON 结构，支持增量生成，降低 AI 负担","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"需生成完整 HTML 结构，易出现语法错误","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"维护成本","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"组件统一管理，更新只需修改客户端库","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"每个 HTML 界面需单独调试","paraId":5,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"A2UI 遵循单向数据流原则，确保数据流向清晰可预测：","paraId":6,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"Agent (LLM) → A2UI Generator → Transport (SSE/WebSocket/A2A)\n                    ↓\nClient (Stream Reader) → Message Parser → Renderer → Native UI\n","paraId":7,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"以餐厅预订为例，展示完整的数据流过程：","paraId":8,"tocIndex":5},{"value":"sequenceDiagram\n    participant User\n    participant Client\n    participant Agent\n\n    User->>Client: \"Book a table for 2 tomorrow at 7pm\"\n    Client->>Agent: 发送用户请求\n\n    Note over Agent: 1. 创建界面容器\n    Agent->>Client: createSurface { surfaceId: \"booking\" }\n\n    Note over Agent: 2. 定义 UI 结构\n    Agent->>Client: updateComponents { components: [...] }\n\n    Note over Agent: 3. 填充初始数据\n    Agent->>Client: updateDataModel { datetime: \"2025-12-16T19:00\", guests: 2 }\n\n    Note over Client: 4. 渲染预订表单\n    Client->>User: 显示日期选择器和客人数量输入\n\n    User->>Client: 修改客人数量为 3\n    Note over Client: 自动更新 /reservation/guests\n\n    User->>Client: 点击\"确认\"按钮\n    Client->>Agent: userAction { name: \"confirm\", context: { guests: 3 } }\n\n    Note over Agent: 5. 处理用户操作\n    Agent->>Client: deleteSurface { surfaceId: \"booking\" }\n    Agent->>Client:
